TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dudley_Bradley, title = Dudley_Bradley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dudley_Bradley} }

S.FORM: Dudley Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 3, Dudley Bradley, squliq na p'unro. Dudley Bradley mzyu mari maki North Carolina krahu' pqwasan biru.1979 kawas,tmwang te mpuw cyugal maki NBA. hiya sangka qeru mzyu mari NBA pspung ru 1988-1989 kawas masoq pspung lga,msriq lanmon,magal 5.2 ŚąÜ,lanpan na 1.8 eŚÄč,1.9 ś¨°Śä©śĒĽ. Dudley Bradley ga qutux squilq na p'unro maki kracht' pqwasan biru. 1979 kawas 1 byacing 17 ryax,Bradley mhtuw squilq na psibay North Carolina krahu' pqwasan biru. qnxan na NBA masoq lga, Bradley mzyu mari qutux ru sazing pspung maki cinbwanan mzyu mari pspung. 1999-1991 kawas pspung ryax,Dudley Bradley maki Saskatchewan mzyu mari. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Dudley Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 3, Dudley Bradley, squliq na p'unro. Dudley Bradley mzyu mari maki North Carolina krahu' pqwasan biru.1979 kawas,tmwang te mpuw cyugal maki NBA. hiya sangka qeru mzyu mari NBA pspung ru 1988-1989 kawas masoq pspung lga,msriq lanmon,magal 5.2 ŚąÜ,lanpan na 1.8 eŚÄč,1.9 ś¨°Śä©śĒĽ. Dudley Bradley ga qutux squilq na p'unro maki kracht' pqwasan biru. 1979 kawas 1 byacing 17 ryax,Bradley mhtuw squilq na psibay North Carolina krahu' pqwasan biru. qnxan na NBA masoq lga, Bradley mzyu mari qutux ru sazing pspung maki cinbwanan mzyu mari pspung. 1999-1991 kawas pspung ryax,Dudley Bradley maki Saskatchewan mzyu mari. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
